subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting, befitting and worthy is He, that through the dawning of the Luminary of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی المیثاق حمد حی قیومرا لائق و شایان که باشراق نیر عهد و پیمان
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @development of capacity and readiness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
